parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Whether the benefit is currently active

parameters.name: enrollment_count
parameters.description: Whether to return employee enrollment count

parameters.name: benefit_type
parameters.description: Filter by benefit type. Comma-separated list of benefit type IDs, i.e. `?benefit_type=5,105`

parameters.name: X-Gusto-API-Version
parameters.description: Determines the date-based API version associated with your API call. If none is provided, your application's [minimum API version](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/api-versioning#minimum-api-version) is used.
